cross_model_validation.gpt_model_note: gpt-5.4-pro returned 'terminated' errors; gpt-5.4 used as equivalent (confirmed available and functional)
cross_model_validation.gemini_note: Gemini validation ran in prior session (2026-03-27T02:09Z); 41KB output. Gemini rerun in this session returned CANCELLED error mid-execution; original output used.

C1-H1.key_agreement: SE(xi)=0.029 claim inconsistent — correct value is ~0.035 at n=300 block minima, not n=5000-7000
C1-H1.key_divergence: GPT: 4/10 (n=13 underpowered, psychrophile counter-evidence); Gemini: 7/10 (mathematical rigor strong, ~10-sigma effect size)
C1-H1.new_finding: 2025 psychrophile study shows Pseudoalteromonas arctica has long right tail extending to 351K, not simple left-shift; FTG guarantees xi<0 for all species (tautology), so magnitude not sign is the meaningful variable
C1-H1.combined_recommendation: PROMISING — pursue with corrections to SE, reframe to |xi| magnitude, add composition controls

C1-H2.key_agreement: Return-level formula has directional error for lower tail; ±2°C precision claim unsupported (95% CI spans ~9°C at n=100); complex bottleneck concept real but mechanism oversimplified
C1-H2.key_divergence: GPT: 5/10 (error correctable, framework salvageable); Gemini: 2/10 (extrapolation from 15% tail to 99% bulk invalid)
C1-H2.new_citation_error: GPT found Sun et al. 2023 NatComm is first author Sun, not Lim (Yan Ting Lim is coauthor); another citation correction required
C1-H2.new_biology: Tufm (mitochondrial translation factor) is hypersensitive to heat — an example of special-regulator failure that breaks minimum-subunit bottleneck model
C1-H2.combined_recommendation: NEEDS WORK — correct formula, remove ±2°C claim, use essential-subunit definitions, use intact-cell TPP for validation

C1-H7.key_agreement: Protein-size confound is mathematically exact: sigma_Tm = b*sigma_ln(MW). n=13 severely underpowered (requires |partial_r|>0.75 for 80% power with covariates). Drummond 2005 is PNAS confirmed.
C1-H7.key_divergence: Gemini: 4/10 (confound controllable in principle); GPT: 2/10 (fundamental redesign required)
C1-H7.gemini_proof: Algebraically proved sigma_Tm = b*sigma_ln(MW) via GPD affine transformation; ratio verified as exactly 2.000 in simulation
C1-H7.combined_recommendation: UNLIKELY in current form — redesign as within-species protein-level analysis, not species-level correlation

cross_cutting_findings.evt_in_proteomics_prior_art: EVT applied to MS score calibration and biomarker null distributions — but NOT to thermal stability distributions. Novel bridge confirmed by GPT web search.
cross_cutting_findings.meltome_atlas_status: Still 13 species / ~48,000 proteins as of 2026-03-27. No peer-reviewed cross-species expansion found.
cross_cutting_findings.mathematical_interdependence: sigma_GPD = sigma_GEV + xi*(u-mu). H1/H2/H3 parameters are mathematically coupled transforms of same GEV fit, not independent variables.
cross_cutting_findings.best_hypothesis_to_pursue: C1-H2 (both models agree complex-level thermal coupling is real and tractable within a single species, avoiding n=13 cross-species limit)
